_comment: Baseline for Req 11.6.1 detection. Derived from the 6.4.3 inventory + enforced CSP. Volatile fields (nonce, csrf, price) are normalized to * by the detector before diffing. Changed only via reviewed PR.

headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://js.psp.example 'nonce-*'; connect-src 'self' https://api.psp.example; frame-src https://js.psp.example; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
